name: game-context-manager
description: Local-first desktop GUI for managing agent-readable game context files.

scripts.test: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsx tests/unit/sqliteService.test.ts && tsx tests/unit/workspaceService.test.ts && tsx tests/unit/fileExportService.test.ts && tsx tests/unit/aiProviderService.test.ts
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && electron-vite build
